leadText: Heart Stamp (Japanese: ハートスタンプ Heart Stamp) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Heart Stamp inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of causing the target to flinch . Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Heart Stamp cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user unleashes a vicious blow after its cute act makes the target less wary. It may also make the target flinch. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user unleashes a vicious blow after its cute act makes the target less wary. This may also make the target flinch. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It damages an enemy. It could also cause the Cringe status condition, which makes the enemy unable to attack or use moves. S MD It damages an enemy. It could also make the enemy flinch.
